description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display dominating the front surface. The screen shows a colorful user interface with app icons arranged in a grid, resembling the iOS home screen, and a subtle gradient wallpaper. The device has a slim, rectangular form factor with rounded corners and a black bezel surrounding the display. On one side, there are three physical buttons, likely for volume control and power, which are metallic and slightly raised for tactile feedback. The phone's body appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a sleek and premium appearance. No visible branding or camera modules are present on the visible surfaces in these views.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge touchscreen, black bezel, and metallic side buttons. The display shows a colorful grid of app icons on a gradient background.
description_view_0: The phone is seen from a low side angle, highlighting the slim profile, black bezel, and three metallic side buttons.
description_view_1: A front-facing view shows the full touchscreen display with app icons and a gradient wallpaper, emphasizing the edge-to-edge design.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, showing the slim profile and black bezel, but the side buttons are less visible.
description_view_3: A slightly angled front view, focusing on the touchscreen display and rounded corners, with the app icons clearly visible.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a grid of colorful app icons, a gradient wallpaper, and a status bar at the top, resembling an iOS home screen. No notifications or widgets are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: none visible; no camera modules or lenses are apparent on the front or sides in these views.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible on the right edge: two elongated buttons likely for volume control and a smaller button for power.
